pi_items.source: Task description explicitly dictates this directory path.

Python evaluation of the task stated parsing logic string replacement rule: (50.00) - (25.00) transforms to -50.00 - -25.00, which evaluates to -25.00 mathematically contradicting the metadata claim of -75.00.

privileged_info_summary: The task instructions explicitly state the module must be saved in C:\Users\Docker\AppData\Roaming\talon\user\accounting_math. However, the provided metadata contains a critical mathematical error in its test_cases: the expression (50.00) - (25.00) claims to expect -75.00, but strictly following the task description to convert parenthetical numbers to standard negatives yields -50.00 - -25.00, which correctly evaluates to -25.00.
